{{CargoRelic
|name=Nash Equilibrium
|class_id=22740
|rank=SS
|affct=TECH
|birthday=01-12
|source=
|description=On Jan 12, 1944 AD, Nash defined the concept of Nash equilibrium using rigorous mathematical language.<br>The Nash equilibrium can be divided into two types: pure strategy Nash equilibrium and mixed strategy Nash equilibrium. It created the theory of non-cooperative games, and made a clear distinction and definition between cooperative and non-cooperative games. It is highly original and laid the fundamental basis for modern game theory and economics.
|fame=66
|art=45
|fth=73
|civ=58
|tech=105
|ss1=Snail ATK +10<br>Snail DEF +10<br>Snail RUSH +10
|ss2=Snail ATK +20<br>Snail DEF +20<br>Snail RUSH +20
|ss3=Snail ATK +30<br>Snail DEF +30<br>Snail RUSH +30
|ss4=Snail ATK +50<br>Snail DEF +50<br>Snail RUSH +50
|ss5=Snail ATK +70<br>Snail DEF +70<br>Snail RUSH +70
|ss6=Snail ATK +100<br>Snail DEF +100<br>Snail RUSH +100
|ss7=Snail ATK +100<br>Snail DEF +100<br>Snail RUSH +100<br>Snail HP +1000 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Skill skill III.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
|skill2=[[File:Skill skill III.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
|skill3=[[File:Skill skill III.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
|mirage={{Mirage|name=Game Theory Master|reward={{RewardIconWithLink|Master Scroll, +40|orange}}
|3name=Harsanyi|3rec=136.79M|3atk=377515|3defense=236356|3hp=22157816|3weak=38045
|4name=Reinhard|4rec=204.81M|4atk=540479|4defense=332048|4hp=41282288|4weak=44211
|5name=John Nash|5rec=321.83M|5atk=758069|5defense=452097|5hp=82859787|5weak=52411
|Arec=452.56M|Aatk=978152|Adefense=569707|Ahp=141210082|Aweak=58053
}}}}
